attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Participates in breakaway efforts but lacks finishing power after bridging efforts. Energy management appears problematic when attempting solo chase efforts of 20km+.
team_tactics: Elite domestique for JUMBO-VISMA, anchoring tempo work to keep protected riders together. Sacrifices individual opportunities for team cohesion and collective finishes.
terrain_preference: Most effective on controlled, tempo-driven stages where sustained diesel pace-making is required. Exposed when requiring explosive accelerations or repeated efforts after significant solo bridging attempts.
vulnerability: Gets dropped from breakaways after expending energy on long solo bridge efforts (20km chase). Cannot sustain position after high-cost bridging work, suggesting poor recovery from anaerobic efforts.
key_patterns: Functions as team anchor/tempo setter rather than individual finisher (2 observations)
Energy depletion after solo bridging attempts leads to being dropped (2 observations)
Strong team-oriented riding prioritizing collective over individual results (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Showed initial strength as domestique but subsequent energy mismanagement and dropped from break suggests declining form or poor tactical execution within same race
